commands: for skill in .codex/skills/*-af; do python3 $HOME/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/scripts/quick_validate.py $skill; done

notes: prepare derives work-unit/<work-unit-id> and reuses the same registered branch/worktree pair for re-execution or rework.
cleanup requires --human-decision approved, refuses dirty state, uses non-force removal, and retains the branch.
Stable porcelain and NUL-delimited Git output are parsed without shell interpolation.
INTAKE-DECISION-036 was incorporated after it appeared as accepted repository evidence during Execution.
A context-isolated agent forward-tested the skill without reading its tests and found no normal-path usability or safety issue.

Human Review P1: lifecycle은 $CODEX_HOME/skills를 single active location으로 규정하지만 구현은 .codex/skills에만 존재해 fresh session discovery contract가 충돌한다.
Human Review P2: unlock 이후 worktree remove 실패를 주입하면 worktree가 존재하지만 lock이 복구되지 않는 부분 실패가 확인됐다.
